jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: STAS is a global leader in providing equipment that enhances the productivity and quality of aluminum. Our purpose is to accelerate the progress of industrial producers in order to have a positive and sustainable impact on society. Would you like to play an active role in innovation, take on concrete challenges, be part of a vibrant and human-centered company culture, and join a team with a worldwide presence? jobs.title: Allison Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: The Opportunity The person in this position oversees the indirect sales of Allison Transmission Inc. (ATI) products. The Role Meet with customers and help them select the right products for their needs. Offer various product options and extended warranty programs. Perform product performance evaluations based on customer requirements (SCAAN program). Promote Wajax workshops to increase parts and service revenue. Ensure communication between the dealer network, the distributor, and Allison Trans…

jobs.title: Product Manager (Askuity division)
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Job Description Pay Range: $90,000 - $120,000 At The Home Depot Canada, we want you to feel valued and supported. The pay range you see represents base salary only. In addition, your total rewards may include: semi-annual bonuses tied to business performance; Deferred Profit-Sharing Program to assist with retirement savings; comprehensive paid benefits; a 15% discount on Home Depot stock purchases; and merit-based salary increases. jobs.title: Product Manager National Bank Trust
jobs.descriptionSnippet: A career as a Product Manager within the Product Management and Innovation team at National Bank Trust means acting as the strategic owner of a product suite, driving its performance to support growth, profitability, and differentiation of the offering. This role allows you to have a tangible impact on the organization by leveraging your knowledge of the institutional market and your expertise in product management.
